scope: ACL27 supplement round-7 crop, scale, and incomplete-display scan with a targeted review-packet contact-sheet fix.

finding.blocking_issue: Figure S40 / PDF page 43 review-packet media manifest had internal contact-sheet display defects: the left label lane could collide with the first thumbnail, and VLM target-view tiles could be cropped or padded with black because source crops were fit as cover-style tiles and some crop coordinates exceeded the 1602-pixel-wide source figure.
finding.fig_s25_status: Rechecked Figure S25 / PDF page 27. The bottom claim-boundary gate schematic remains fully visible in the final PDF and standalone source image; no S25 edit was required in this pass.
finding.other_pages_status: Systematic contact-sheet review of pages 1-46 found no additional obvious PDF-level clipping, caption collision, or incomplete figure display blocker after the page-43 fix.

changes: Changed _draw_contact_row in paper/shared/figures/gen_supplement_task_media_atlases.py from _crop_fit to _crop_contain so source-index thumbnails are letterboxed rather than center-cropped.
Widened the review-packet contact-sheet label lane from 225 px to 280 px so long labels such as Material diagnostics stay clear of thumbnails.
Replaced VLM target-view contact-sheet crop coordinates with source-bounded card crops inside the 1602x1672 clean-rerender panel.
Added regression assertions in tests/test_paper_layout.py for contain scaling, label-lane width, and source-bounded VLM crop coordinates.

visual_review.reviewer: Codex local visual review using browser-visual-review and render-visual-reviewer paper-figure protocol; no subagent spawned because the user did not request delegation.
visual_review.standalone_contact_sheet: PASS. Row labels no longer overlap thumbnails. VLM target-view tiles show four bounded card crops without black out-of-bounds padding.
visual_review.pdf_page_43: PASS. The rendered page shows Figure S40 contained inside the page, with the caption below and no label/thumbnail occlusion visible at paper scale.
visual_review.pdf_page_45: PASS. Figure S41 still embeds the updated packet index cleanly and remains contained with its caption.
visual_review.pdf_page_27_fig_s25: PASS. Figure S25's bottom claim-boundary gate schematic is fully visible; no page-edge or caption collision is present.

verification.result: PASS; output written on build/supplement.pdf (46 pages, 48662958 bytes)

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|Rerun to get|Warning:.*Label|Undefined references|multiply defined" paper/venues/acl27/build/supplement.log || true
python -m pytest -q tests/test_paper_layout.py -k 'review_packet_contact_sheet or reproducibility_has_visual_media_manifest or source_boundary_companion_is_registered_and_dense'

residual_risk: This pass targeted visible containment, clipping, occlusion, and scaling defects. Several atlas/contact-sheet pages remain intentionally dense, but no obvious incomplete-display blocker was observed in the final page renders.
